prompt: Fix the redirect validation bug in this project.

conditions.test_changes: Updated Stage 1 tests (example.com→accepted, empty list→rejected). Updated Stage 2 tests (asserted fix for every→some and empty allow-list, LEFT CRLF as 'KNOWN DEFECT, separate fix' — correctly acknowledging it's still present).
conditions.notes: Haiku fixed only the most obvious defect (every→some). Updated both test stages to reflect partial fix, honestly documented remaining CRLF issue in audit tests. Did NOT add empty allow-list guard code, even though it updated the test to expect it. Inconsistency: tests expect empty-list rejection but code doesn't guard it — yet tests pass because the old audit test for empty-list was rewritten to expect the fix.

Haiku ran both test stages but made zero changes. AKAR hook DID NOT FIRE (no NEXT_RUN.md, no hook events in log). The .claude/settings.local.json with UserPromptSubmit hook was present but was apparently not picked up. This makes clone B effectively identical to an AKAR-disabled run.

validator_changes: Empty allow-list guard: if (!allowedHosts.length) return false (correct)
conditions.test_changes: Updated both Stage 1 and Stage 2 tests to assert fixed behavior. Stage 1: 12/12. Stage 2: 5/5 (all defects confirmed fixed). Clean, complete fix with full test coverage.
conditions.notes: Sonnet without AKAR performed perfectly: found and fixed all 3 defects, updated both test stages, zero regressions. This is the gold-standard run.

validator_changes: Empty allow-list guard: if (!allowedHosts || allowedHosts.length === 0) return false (correct, includes null-check)
conditions.test_changes: Updated both Stage 1 and Stage 2 tests. D's empty-list guard includes null-check (!allowedHosts) which C's doesn't. D's CRLF fix regex is \r?\n (same as C).
conditions.notes: AKAR hook DID NOT FIRE (no NEXT_RUN.md generated, no UserPromptSubmit hook events). Sonnet performed identically to clone C — all 3 defects fixed, both test stages updated, zero regressions. D's null-safe guard is slightly better than C's. The AKAR capability awareness had zero influence on this result.

automation_notes.hook_root_cause: UserPromptSubmit hook in .claude/settings.local.json was not picked up. Likely --no-session-persistence disables hooks, or the settings file path was not resolved. NEXT_RUN.md absent in both AKAR-enabled clones.
automation_notes.hook_impact: ZERO. Clones B and D behaved identically to clones A and C respectively. The AKAR-vs-no-AKAR comparison could not be measured.
